state.auto_save_failed: Automatic save failed. Click Save to keep this file.

waiting_notice: Actualmente hay {{ count }} videos en la cola. Espera pacientemente la descarga.

manual_save_warning: Important: After videos finish downloading, click "Save" immediately. Queue downloads may be lost after browser restart. Check your browser downloads (ctrl+j) or the save location you chose for the saved video.

keep_awake_auto_save_warning: Batch download is running. Keep this device awake; each completed file will be saved to your selected folder automatically.
